summary: "BACK" button navigates user to the top of the page - HOME PAGE
description:
Given user is navigating the MLB app 

And user is either on the Home page

When the user select the “Back” button on their remote control

Then the user is redirected to the top of the page - w/ focus on the Home nav button

steps.action: WHEN the user select the "Back" button on their remote control
steps.result:
THEN the user is redirected to the top of the page - w/ focus on the Home nav button.

AND all carousels will be reset to their original state.
